name: Magnetic Makeout
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: The shortstacked minx purrs with obscene delight as she pulls [TargetName] into a hot and heavy, tongue-entangling contest while gazing lustfully into [TargetHisOrHer] eyes with electrifying desire, filling [TargetHimOrHer] with the floaty, blissfully oozing feeling that this moment won't ever end.
miss: The shortstacked minx purrs with obscene delight as she pulls [TargetName] into a hot and heavy, tongue-entangling contest, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to endure her steamy kiss' perverted passion!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] can't help but be filled with magnetic infatuation as [TargetHeOrShe] gets increasingly kiss-drunk from [AttackerName]'s expert, voltaically-charged makeout, their lips never once seeming to part through the buzzing greedy smooching.
